text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Summer camp has once again started, and this
camp will be a critical part of our preparations for
our showdown with Narita Brian.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I show Biwa Hayahide the data that I've
meticulously prepared. There's a vast amount of
notes, covering everything from her next race to
the Arima Kinen.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Seeing the volume of data, she realizes the sheer
effort I used to gather it all and begins worrying
about my health.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Our second summer camp will bring us one step
closer to completing her winning equation.
